title: BEM-866 heartbeat queue check
objective:
Run script:
"""
heartbeat = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_STEP_HEARTBEAT.md')
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
result_file = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK'
elif heartbeat.exists() and queue.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_EXECUTED_QUEUE_STILL_PENDING'
elif heartbeat.exists() and result_file.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_EXECUTED_RESULT_EXISTS'
elif heartbeat.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_EXECUTED'
else:
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_HEARTBEAT_QUEUE_CHECK_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 heartbeat queue check\nStatus: ' + status + '\nHeartbeat exists: ' + str(heartbeat.exists()) + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResult exists: ' + str(result_file.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('heartbeat queue check: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
